title: Valley of Terror
writer: James Oliver Curwood, John T. Neville, Sherman L. Lowe
actors: Kermit Maynard, Harley Wood, John Merton
plot: A cowboy finds himself in jail for rustling cattle. His buddy gets the idea to form a lynch mob in the hopes of arranging his escape once the mob takes him out of jail. However, things don't quite work out the way he planned.
